---
pagetitle: "Econometrics: Time Series Analysis"
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

:::: hero

<!-- []{.hero-kicker} --> 

# Econometrics {.hero-title}

[Time Series Analysis]{.hero-subtitle}

::: hero-lede
- This website is built around my lecture slides, with my broader course narrative woven around them so that the site also serves as a self-contained reference for the module. 

- Throughout, you'll find signposts to textbooks, animations, live R graphs, audio snippets, and other resources where relevant.

- If there's a specific concept you'd like more support with, let me know. The syllabus is fixed, but I'm happy to add the occasional supplementary materials like an audio snippet or a screen recording to explain a given topic in a little more detail.


:::

::::

:::::: topic-grid

::::: {.topic-card}

[Topic 01]{.topic-num}

[Introducing Time Series Analysis]{.topic-title}

[Core statistical foundations, what time series analysis is, and why it needs special techniques.]{.topic-desc}

:::: topic-links
[Read notes →](Topic1.html){.topic-read}
[PDF ↓](Topic1.pdf){.topic-pdf}
::::

:::::

::::: {.topic-card}

[Topic 02]{.topic-num}

[Introducing ARMA(p, q) models]{.topic-title}

[White noise, MA and AR building blocks, the lag operator, and the full ARMA(p, q) family.]{.topic-desc}

:::: topic-links
[Read notes →](Topic2.html){.topic-read}
[PDF ↓](Topic2.pdf){.topic-pdf}
::::

:::::

::::: {.topic-card}

[Topic 03]{.topic-num}

[Measuring dependence]{.topic-title}

[Autocovariance and autocorrelation functions — how we quantify dependence across time.]{.topic-desc}

:::: topic-links
[Read notes →](Topic3.html){.topic-read}
[PDF ↓](Topic3.pdf){.topic-pdf}
::::

:::::

::::: {.topic-card}

[Topic 04]{.topic-num}

[Defining stationarity]{.topic-title}

[Strong and weak stationarity, and the autocovariance structure of stationary series.]{.topic-desc}

:::: topic-links
[Read notes →](Topic4.html){.topic-read}
[PDF ↓](Topic4.pdf){.topic-pdf}
::::

:::::

::::: {.topic-card .upcoming}

[Coming soon]{.topic-num}

[More topics]{.topic-title}

[Further topics will be added here as the module progresses.]{.topic-desc}

:::::

::::::
